entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop discussed in terms of production, yield, and pest management.

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of sorghum grain produced globally and regionally.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of sorghum productivity per unit area.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country noted for having improvements in sorghum production.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where increasing sorghum production is an urgent problem.

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where sorghum is primarily used for human food and research resources are limited.

entities.name: DEVELOPED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where sorghum research is extensive and well-documented.

entities.name: ENTOMOLOGY
entities.description: The scientific study of insects, applied here to sorghum pest control.

entities.name: PEST LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in sorghum crop output due to insect damage.

entities.name: CONTROL OF DAMAGE
entities.description: The application of techniques to reduce losses caused by pests in sorghum.
